SEARCH
Package user

Class Employee

java.lang.Object
user.User
user.Employee
public class Employee extends User
It implements the employee

1.0

  • Constructor Details

    • Employee

      public Employee(String pwd, String userName, Permission p, boolean asc)
      Creates a new employee
      Parameters:
      pwd - the password of the employee
      userName - the employee's username
      p - the employee's permission
      asc - the products' order in the search

    • addComic

      public boolean addComic(double price, String name, String description, String photo, int stock, int numPages, Year year, String author, String editorial, Category... categories)
      Adds and creates new comic
      Parameters:
      price - the price of the comic
      name - the name of the comic
      description - the description of the comic
      photo - the photo of the comic
      stock - the comic's stock
      numPages - the comic's number of pages
      year - the year of publication
      author - the comic's author
      editorial - the comic's editorial
      categories - the comic's categories
      Returns:
      true if the comic was added, false if else

    • addGame

      public boolean addGame(double price, String name, String description, String photo, int stock, int numPlayers, String ageRange, GameStyle gameStyle, Category... categories)
      Adds and creates new game
      Parameters:
      price - the price of the game
      name - the name of the game
      description - the description of the game
      photo - the photo of the comic
      stock - the game's stock
      numPlayers - the game's number of players
      ageRange - the game's age range
      gameStyle - the style of the game
      categories - the game's categories
      Returns:
      true if the game was added, false if else

    • addFigurine

      public boolean addFigurine(double price, String name, String description, String photo, int stock, String dimensions, String brand, String material, Category... categories)
      Adds and creates new figurine
      Parameters:
      price - the price of the figurine
      name - the name of the figurine
      description - the description of the figurine
      photo - the photo of the figurine
      stock - the figurine's stock
      dimensions - the figurine's dimensions
      brand - the figurine's brand
      material - the figurine's material
      categories - the figurine's categories
      Returns:
      true if the figurine was added, false if else

      public boolean addProductFromFile(String filename)
      Adds and creates new products from a file
      Parameters:

      Returns:
      true if the product's were added successfully, false if else

      public boolean manageExchange(Exchange exchange, boolean e)
      Manages exchange
      Parameters:
      exchange - the exchange to manage
      e - whether the exchange has been done or not
      Returns:
      true if the order could be managed, false if else

    • valuate

      public boolean valuate(SecondHandProduct secondHandProduct, double valuation, ConservationStatus status)
      Gives a secondhand product a value
      Parameters:
      secondHandProduct - the second-hand product to value
      valuation - the valuation(price)
      status - the conservation status
      Returns:
      true if the product could be evaluated, false if else

      Parameters:

      valuation - the valuation(price)
      status - the conservation status
      valuationDate - the date of valuation
      Returns:
      true if the product could be evaluated, false if else
